scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter './apps/api' typecheck && bun run --filter './apps/web' typecheck && bun run --filter './packages/shared' typecheck
scripts.test: PLOTLINE_TEST_MODE=1 PLOTLINE_TEST_DATA_DIR=${PLOTLINE_TEST_DATA_DIR:-data-test} bun run --filter './apps/api' --filter './packages/shared' test && PLOTLINE_TEST_MODE=1 PLOTLINE_TEST_DATA_DIR=${PLOTLINE_TEST_DATA_DIR:-data-test} bun run --cwd apps/web test
